creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I would like to commit this port, but can you specify the files 
required: 

DISTFILES=	xxxx 

and then if they really exist in /usr/ports/distfiles: 

.if !exists(${DISTDIR}/foo.sys) 
IGNORE=         You need to copy some file to ${DISTDIR} 
.endif
